"D:\CLION111\CLion 2021.1.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\6.dir/objects.a
D:\CLION111\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\6.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\6.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\CLION111\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\6.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o 6.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib6.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\6.dir\linklibs.rsp
